title: Quality Assurance
subtitle: Quality Assurance
description: Multi-dimensional automated evaluation of generated content through Generator-Critic iterative loops. Ensures Agent output quality meets standards.
sub_problems: Fact checking: Does generated content align with source materials
Format validation: Does output conform to expected format
Consistency checking: Are results consistent across multiple generations
Iterative improvement: Generator-Critic loop until quality threshold is met
Citation integrity: Do citation IDs in generated text actually exist in the citation library
Input security validation: Are uploaded file types, sizes, and MIME types compliant
best_practices: Separate Generator and Critic: Self-evaluation by the same Agent performs poorly; adversarial collaboration elevates quality
Multi-dimensional evaluation over single score: Score accuracy/expression/professionalism separately for precise problem identification
Triple termination conditions prevent waste: Stop when score threshold met OR improvement converges OR round limit reached
Structured feedback is actionable: specific_issues + improvement_suggestions, not vague "make it better"
Failure isolation matrix: Retry critical nodes, skip enhancement nodes, differentiate handling by importance
Paragraph-level granularity over full-text: Evaluate and improve paragraph-by-paragraph for better precision than single full-text score
Pydantic model validation over manual dict checks: Type safety, auto-formatted error messages, nested validation support
Classify over reject: RelevanceAnalyzer marks high/partial rather than pass/fail, preserving all content value
Two-stage precision saves resources: First determine if precise answers are needed, avoid uniform precision for all questions

values.DeerFlow: Three-layer fault isolation + failure isolation matrix
values.DeepTutor: Four-layer progression: Pydantic structural validation → citation integrity → semantic classification → precision decision
values.PageIndex: LLM-as-Judge fuzzy matching + deterministic boundary validation dual-layer verification

values.DeepTutor: Structural correctness + citation existence + semantic relevance (high/partial)
Independent validation per Agent output, 5 Pydantic models cover full pipeline
Tenacity exponential backoff retry (default 2 attempts), no Generator-Critic loop
Pydantic ValidationError formatted as readable error messages, drives retry
values.PageIndex: Accuracy threshold tiered decision: 1.0 pass / >0.6 fix / ≤0.6 downgrade regenerate

values.DeepTutor: fix_invalid_citations() automatically removes invalid citation IDs
values.PageIndex: Scope-narrowed targeted repair + validate after repair, max 3 retry rounds

values.DeepTutor: Five output types: Investigate/Note/Reflect/Plan/Solve + citations + configuration + file uploads
values.PageIndex: TOC extraction completeness + conversion completeness + page mapping accuracy + physical boundary legality

values.DeepTutor: Research CitationManager uses asyncio.Lock to protect parallel ID allocation
values.PageIndex: asyncio.gather concurrent validation and repair, tasks completely independent

values.DeepTutor: RelevanceAnalyzer failure returns default partial; safe_parse returns default value
values.PageIndex: Three-level progressive degradation: TOC with page numbers → TOC without page numbers → full-text scan without TOC

solutions.title: Three-Layer Fault Isolation + SubagentStatus 5-State Machine + Failure Isolation Matrix
solutions.description: DeerFlow implements three-layer fault tolerance: workflow layer (recursion_limit=25/50 prevents infinite loops), Agent layer (SubagentStatus 5-state machine PENDING→RUNNING→COMPLETED/FAILED/TIMED_OUT + dual thread pool architecture), LLM call layer (DanglingToolCallMiddleware auto-injects status="error" placeholder to fix dangling tool calls + SummarizationMiddleware three-trigger compression). Failure isolation matrix: critical nodes (coordinator/planner) retry, enhancement nodes (researcher/coder) skip, loop nodes (human_feedback) have recursion_limit.

solutions.title: Reviewer Multi-Dimensional Scoring System + 6 Check Dimensions + Problem Classification
solutions.description: Three-stage quality check: Phase 0 learning objective achievement (LEARNING_OBJECTIVE_MISMATCH/CONTRADICTION/INSUFFICIENT + TERMINOLOGY_UNDEFINED/CONFUSION/MISUSE + CONTENT_OFF_TOPIC/IRRELEVANT_DISCUSSION), Phase 1 expression quality (SENTENCE_TOO_LONG/GRAMMAR_ERROR/LOGIC_JUMP/REPETITION + WORD_MISUSE/CONCEPT_CONFUSION/INACCURATE_EXPRESSION + MISSING_TRANSITION/PARAGRAPH_TOO_LONG), Phase 2 professionalism (TERMINOLOGY_INCONSISTENCY/TRANSLATION_INCONSISTENT + CODE_BLOCK_MISSING_LANGUAGE/LIST_FORMAT_INCONSISTENT + MISSING_SOURCE_CITATION/HANGING_REFERENCE). Multi-dimensional scoring: accuracy(40) + expression_quality(30) + professionalism(20) + completeness(10) = 100 points, passing threshold score >= 80.

solutions.title: Generator-Critic Dual Agent Iterative Loop + SectionEvaluator 4-Dimensional Evaluation
solutions.description: Inspired by AutoFigure's Generator-Critic Loop: WriterAgent generates/improves content, QuestionerAgent (SectionEvaluator) evaluates each section across 4 dimensions (information_density/logical_coherence/professional_depth/expression_quality). Outputs structured JSON: scores + overall_quality + specific_issues + improvement_suggestions. Triple termination conditions: score threshold (overall_quality >= 9.0) + improvement magnitude (delta < 0.3 stops convergence) + max rounds (max_rounds=2). Key methods: evaluate_section() paragraph-level evaluation, improve_section() targeted improvement, _should_improve_sections() convergence judgment.

solutions.title: Multi-Layer Output Validation and Citation Integrity Solution
solutions.description: Input security validation (file uploads, configuration files) is also a prerequisite for quality assurance.

solutions.title: Source Citation Verification Solution
solutions.description: Citations in LLM-generated research reports exhibit four classes of quality issues.

solutions.title: LLM Output Accuracy Verification Closed Loop
solutions.description: LLM performance on long-document structured tasks (PDF TOC extraction, chapter page mapping) shows non-negligible error rates. Typical issues include structural data errors.
